findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ResourceHandlerImpl path validation analysis
 * @description Find how resource names and library names are validated and used
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/myfaces-resource-handler-validation
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find the ResourceHandlerImpl class and how it handles resource requests
from MethodCall mc, Method m
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.myfaces.application", "ResourceHandlerImpl") and
  mc.getMethod() = m and
  (
    m.hasName("handleResourceRequest") or
    m.hasName("createResource") or
    m.hasName("libraryExists")
  )
select mc, "ResourceHandlerImpl method call: " + m.getName()
findings.hypothesis: Examining ResourceHandlerImpl to understand how it validates resource names from HTTP requests

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ClassLoaderResourceLoader - path construction
 * @description Examine how ClassLoaderResourceLoader builds paths from resource names
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/myfaces-classloader-resource-paths
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find all method calls in resource loader classes that construct paths
from MethodCall mc, Class c
where
  c.getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.myfaces.shared.resource", "ResourceLoader") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType() = c and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName(["getResource", "getResourceAsStream"]) or
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File")
  )
select mc, "Resource loading in " + c.getName() + ": " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: ClassLoaderResourceLoader and ExternalContextResourceLoader build paths that may be controllable by users

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ResourceHandlerImpl - getResourceName from request URI
 * @description Find how resource name is extracted from request URI and used
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/myfaces-resource-name-extraction
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find getRequestURI, getPathInfo, getRequestURL, getServletPath calls in ResourceHandlerImpl
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("org.apache.myfaces.%") and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getRequestURI") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getPathInfo") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getServletPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getRequestURL") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getResourceName") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getLibraryName") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getResourceIdentifier")
  )
select mc, mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + "() calls: " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Find where resource names are extracted from HTTP request URI or path parameters

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Path traversal check - does ResourceHandlerImpl validate resource/library names?
 * @description Look for path traversal checks (contains, indexOf "..", "/") in resource handling
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/myfaces-traversal-check-presence
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find any checks for ".." or path separators in the resource handler
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("org.apache.myfaces.%") and
  (
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("%.resource.%") or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("%.ResourceHandler%") or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("%ResourceHandlerImpl%")
  ) and
  (
    (mc.getMethod().hasName("contains") and mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "String")) or
    (mc.getMethod().hasName("indexOf") and mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "String")) or
    (mc.getMethod().hasName("matches") and mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "String")) or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("isInvalid") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("isValidResourceName") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("isValidLibraryName") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("sanitize") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("normalize") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath")
  )
select mc, "Path check in " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Looking for presence or absence of path traversal validation in resource handling code

message.text: Path check in VersionComparator.compare at line 97
Path check in VersionComparator.compare at line 98

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ResourceHandlerImpl handleResourceRequest - identifies resource from request
 * @description Find how handleResourceRequest parses resource name from request URL path
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/myfaces-handle-resource-request-parsing
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Look at all methods in ResourceHandlerImpl and find string manipulation on path components
from Method m, MethodCall mc
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.myfaces.application", "ResourceHandlerImpl") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("substring") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("indexOf") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("lastIndexOf") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("split") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("replace") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("replaceAll")
  )
select mc, m.getName() + " performs string op " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: ResourceHandlerImpl parses resource names from request URLs through string manipulation

message.text: handleResourceRequest performs string op substring at line 297

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ResourceMetaImpl getResourceIdentifier - path construction details
 * @description How ResourceMetaImpl constructs resource identifiers from name and library
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/myfaces-resource-meta-identifier
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find exactly how resource identifiers are assembled in resource meta classes
from Method m, ReturnStmt ret
where
  m.getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("org.apache.myfaces.shared.resource.%") and
  m.hasName("getResourceIdentifier") and
  ret.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select ret, m.getDeclaringType().getName() + ".getResourceIdentifier() returns: " + ret.getResult().toString() + " at line " + ret.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: How resource identifiers are constructed from user-controlled names and library names

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name InternalClassLoaderResourceLoader path traversal check
 * @description Check if InternalClassLoaderResourceLoader has any path validation
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/myfaces-internal-classloader-resource-loader
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find all method calls in InternalClassLoaderResourceLoader
from Method m, MethodCall mc
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.myfaces.resource", "InternalClassLoaderResourceLoader") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select mc, "InternalClassLoaderResourceLoader." + m.getName() + " calls " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: InternalClassLoaderResourceLoader may lack path traversal validation

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ResourceHandlerImpl handleResourceRequest flow - request params to createResource
 * @description Find the exact flow of request params (ln, resourceName) to resource creation
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/myfaces-handleresourcerequest-flow
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find ALL method calls in ResourceHandlerImpl.handleResourceRequest
from Method m, MethodCall mc
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.myfaces.application", "ResourceHandlerImpl") and
  m.hasName("handleResourceRequest") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select mc, "handleResourceRequest calls: " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Tracing all calls made within handleResourceRequest to understand the complete resource serving flow

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name isResourceIdentifierExcluded - what does it check?
 * @description Determine what validation isResourceIdentifierExcluded performs
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/myfaces-resource-identifier-excluded
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find what isResourceIdentifierExcluded checks
from Method m, MethodCall mc
where
  m.hasName("isResourceIdentifierExcluded") and
  m.getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("org.apache.myfaces.%") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select mc, "isResourceIdentifierExcluded calls: " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName() + "(" + concat(int i, string s | s = mc.getArgument(i).toString() | s, ", ") + ") at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: isResourceIdentifierExcluded may only check file extensions, not path traversal sequences

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name InternalClassLoaderResourceLoader - sensitive resource access
 * @description Check if InternalClassLoaderResourceLoader allows access to WEB-INF or sensitive classpath resources
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/myfaces-internal-loader-sensitive-access
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find the prefix/path used in InternalClassLoaderResourceLoader when building resource paths
// and check for any WEB-INF filtering
from Method m, Expr e
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.myfaces.resource", "InternalClassLoaderResourceLoader") and
  e.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  (
    e instanceof StringLiteral or
    (e instanceof MethodCall and 
     (e.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName(["getResourceAsStream", "getResource"]) or
      e.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName(["startsWith", "contains", "endsWith"])))
  )
select e, m.getName() + ": " + e.toString() + " at line " + e.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: InternalClassLoaderResourceLoader may use a path prefix but fail to prevent path traversal to sensitive classpath directories

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ExternalContextResourceLoader - path to filesystem access
 * @description ExternalContextResourceLoader passes resource identifier to ExternalContext.getResource
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/myfaces-external-resource-loader-filesystem
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find all method calls in ExternalContextResourceLoader and the args passed
from Method m, MethodCall mc
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.myfaces.shared.resource", "ExternalContextResourceLoader") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select mc, "ExternalContextResourceLoader." + m.getName() + " calls " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + mc.getMethod().getName() + "(" + mc.getArgument(0).toString() + ") at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: ExternalContextResourceLoader passes resource paths to ExternalContext.getResource which resolves against the web application root
HTTP request URI/path flows through resource handling to ClassLoader.getResource without adequate path traversal prevention

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ClassLoaderResourceLoader getResourceInputStream - complete method analysis
 * @description Full analysis of what path is passed to getResourceAsStream in ClassLoaderResourceLoader
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/myfaces-classloader-resource-path-arg
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find the exact argument expressions passed to getResourceAsStream/getResource in ClassLoaderResourceLoader
from MethodCall mc, Method m
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.myfaces.shared.resource", "ClassLoaderResourceLoader") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  mc.getMethod().hasName(["getResourceAsStream", "getResource"]) and
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "ClassLoader")
select mc, m.getName() + " calls " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " with arg: '" + mc.getArgument(0).toString() + "' at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Examining the exact path argument passed to ClassLoader.getResourceAsStream to confirm unvalidated user input

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Sensitive directory access - missing WEB-INF and META-INF filtering
 * @description Resource loaders lack checks to prevent access to WEB-INF, META-INF sensitive directories
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/myfaces-sensitive-directory-access
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from Method m, MethodCall mc
where
  m.getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("org.apache.myfaces.%resource.%") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  mc.getMethod().hasName(["getResource", "getResourceAsStream"]) and
  (
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "ClassLoader") or
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("javax.faces.context", "ExternalContext")
  ) and
  not exists(MethodCall check |
    check.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
    (check.getMethod().hasName("contains") or check.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") or check.getMethod().hasName("indexOf")) and
    exists(StringLiteral sl | sl = check.getAnArgument() and
      (sl.getValue().matches("%WEB-INF%") or sl.getValue().matches("%META-INF%")))
  )
select mc, "Resource loading without WEB-INF/META-INF check in " + m.getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + m.getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Resource loaders fail to filter out access to sensitive directories like WEB-INF and META-INF
